Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
is Granted without the necessity of an appearance. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Ernest J. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Continued To Aug-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Brian C. Johnson, Esq. of The Chanler Law Group, Tel. 510.848.8880, for plaintiff and moving party;
Anthony Cortez, Esq., of Greenberg Traurig LLP, Tel. 916.442.1111, for defendant, via Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is continued to August 19, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. The Court directed Plaintiff's counsel to file additional document(s) regarding attorney's fees. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Continued To Jul-23-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
